title: Knysna gymnast claims gold at nationals
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A young gymnast from Knysna,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A young gymnast from Knysna, Euphre'za Witbooi, has made her hometown beam with pride after a stellar performance at the recent South African Gymnastics Championships in Pretoria.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A young gymnast from Knysna, Euphre'za Witbooi, has made her hometown beam with pride after a stellar performance at the recent South African Gymnastics Championships in Pretoria."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Competing in the Level 5 U12 category, Witbooi impressed judges with her skill, claiming gold in the vault event and finishing seventh overall in her division."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The talented 11-year-old trains at the Knysna Gymnastics Club under the guidance of coach Yvette Share, whose support and mentorship have played a key role in Witbooi's development.","html":"The talented 11-year-old trains at the Knysna Gymnastics Club under the guidance of coach Yvette Share, whose support and mentorship have played a key role in Witbooi's development."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Just a month before the nationals, Euphre'za showcased her consistency at the Western Province Championships in Saldanha Bay, where she brought home a gold and a silver medal, setting the stage for her national success.","html":"Just a month before the nationals, Euphre'za showcased her consistency at the Western Province Championships in Saldanha Bay, where she brought home a gold and a silver medal, setting the stage for her national success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her journey to the national stage was made possible through a community effort with local residents, businesses, and her school, Fraaisig Primary, rallying together through donations and fundraising events to make her dream a reality.","html":"Her journey to the national stage was made possible through a community effort with local residents, businesses, and her school, Fraaisig Primary, rallying together through donations and fundraising events to make her dream a reality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"How did it all begin?","html":"How did it all begin?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When asked how her love for gymnastics began, Euphre'za said: "When I did my first middle split at home, my cousin Patynn kept on talking and showing us the art of gymnastics. That's when I knew I wanted to do it too."","html":"When asked how her love for gymnastics began, Euphre'za said: "When I did my first middle split at home, my cousin Patynn kept on talking and showing us the art of gymnastics. That's when I knew I wanted to do it too.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her proudest moment so far?","html":"Her proudest moment so far?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":""When I received my gold medal at SA Champs," she said without hesitation.","html":""When I received my gold medal at SA Champs," she said without hesitation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Behind the scenes, Euphre'za follows a disciplined routine."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""The first thing I do when I walk into the gym is stretch, and then I do my vault," she explained. "Before I compete, I pray and coach Yvette always gives me a motivational note to keep with me."","html":""The first thing I do when I walk into the gym is stretch, and then I do my vault," she explained. "Before I compete, I pray and coach Yvette always gives me a motivational note to keep with me.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Outside of gymnastics, Euphre'za enjoys doing handstands for fun and spending time with friends who have been cheering her on throughout her journey.","html":"Outside of gymnastics, Euphre'za enjoys doing handstands for fun and spending time with friends who have been cheering her on throughout her journey."},{"type":"blockquote","text":""My friends and teachers at Fraaisig Primary motivate me to do my best, and they even helped with fundraising for the big competitions.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When asked what the biggest lesson is that she learnt from gymnastics, her answer reflected her growing maturity and determination: "To not give up. when you fall, get back up."","html":"When asked what the biggest lesson is that she learnt from gymnastics, her answer reflected her growing maturity and determination: "To not give up. when you fall, get back up.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"And as for her biggest supporters? "My parents, sister, grandparents, and coach Yvette. Thank you for supporting me on my journey so far."","html":"And as for her biggest supporters? "My parents, sister, grandparents, and coach Yvette. Thank you for supporting me on my journey so far.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Knysna gymnast claims gold at nationals
